name: Hazelnut Double Fudge Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 9-inch unbaked pie shell with crimped edges
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar and cocoa powder thoroughly.
2. Add to the eggs, then add the corn syrup, cream, hazelnut liqueur, and melted butter. Mix well.
3. Fold in the halved hazelnuts and chocolate chips. Pour into the prepared pie shell.
4. Bake for 45 to 50 minutes at 350°F until the filling is set. It will puff up slightly and cracks may form around the edges.
5. Allow the pie to cool. The texture resembles a wet brownie, but the taste is incredibly rich fudge.
6. Serve in small slices.
